tree_inscription_1.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'The soul of the witch
Digs deep into the swamp
Like the [color=gold]roots[/color] of these trees'

tree_inscription_2.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'What the [color=gold]water[/color] swallows
It does not destroy
It only keeps safe'

tree_inscription_3.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'The dead do not leave
They only [color=gold]forget[/color] the way
Back to what they loved'

Lena_without_quest.text: ...For your own good, stay away from the remaining trees. You are not nearly strong enough to handle them.
